summary: The diff implements all three requirements: REQ-1 (golden card icon in corner after focus session), REQ-2 (canvas-based scratch card animation), and REQ-3 (seven shuffled gratitude messages with localStorage persistence). All seven messages appear verbatim in the hook. The GratitudeCard component is positioned fixed bottom-right at z-40, non-blocking. The ScratchCardOverlay uses a canvas-based scratch mechanic with a 55% reveal threshold. The useGratitudeMessages hook implements Fisher-Yates shuffle with localStorage persistence. Integration in RoomPage.tsx shows the card on focus-to-break transition and hides it on new session or dismissal.
